_meta.note: GENERATED — do not hand-edit. Edit the HTML registry then regenerate.

fields.name: JobNumber
fields.label: Job Number
fields.notes: Unique job identifier from Valcre

fields.name: JobName
fields.label: Job Name
fields.notes: Job/project name

fields.name: JobStatus
fields.label: Job Status
fields.notes: Current job status

fields.name: SubjectProperty
fields.label: Subject Property
fields.notes: Property display name from Valcre

fields.name: ClientCompanyName
fields.label: Client Company Name
fields.notes: Client company display name

fields.name: ClientOrganizationAddress
fields.label: Client Organization Address
fields.notes: 4-field structured address (street/city/province/postal) → Contact.AddressStreet/City/State/PostalCode. ⚠ CREATE-ONLY (written only when minting a new contact, never re-PATCHed on edit). NO-CROSS: client address parts come ONLY from client fields, never the property.

fields.name: ClientFirstName
fields.label: Client First Name
fields.notes: ⚠ Contact CREATE-ONLY (set on new-contact creation, not re-PATCHed).

fields.name: ClientLastName
fields.label: Client Last Name
fields.notes: ⚠ Contact CREATE-ONLY.

fields.name: ClientTitle
fields.label: Client Title
fields.notes: ⚠ Contact CREATE-ONLY (app key clientTitle).

fields.name: ClientPhone
fields.label: Client Phone
fields.notes: ⚠ Contact CREATE-ONLY.

fields.name: ClientEmail
fields.label: Client Email
fields.notes: ⚠ Contact CREATE-ONLY. Also the match key — existing contact reused if email matches.

fields.name: PropertyType
fields.label: Property Type
fields.notes: Primary property classification — cascade trigger. Writes BOTH Valcre fields: Property.Type (single validated enum, first of the split) AND Property.Types (multi PascalCase from PropertyTypeEnum).

fields.name: PropertySubtype
fields.label: Property Subtype
fields.notes: Secondary type — overrides Property Rights

fields.name: Tenancy
fields.label: Tenancy
fields.notes: Occupancy type — highest priority override for Property Rights. Valcre custom field CF12408 (SingleOption).

fields.name: StateofImprovements
fields.label: State of Improvements
fields.notes: Derived from Status of Improvements. Valcre custom field CF12409 (SingleOption).

fields.name: StatusofImprovements
fields.label: Status of Improvements
fields.notes: DIRECT user pick — drives the Value Scenarios + Approaches + Property Rights cascade. Valcre custom field CF12407 (SingleOption).

fields.name: InterestAppraised
fields.label: Interest Appraised (Property Rights)
fields.notes: DERIVED (derivePropertyRights) from PropertyType + Subtype + Tenancy — not user-typed. App key interestAppraised → Valcre custom field CF12412 (MultiOption). User sees 'Property Rights'.

fields.name: AuthorizedUse
fields.label: Authorized Use
fields.notes: Insurance overrides Value Scenarios. App keys authorizedUse + intendedUse both → Valcre custom field CF12413 (SingleOption).

fields.name: ValueScenarios
fields.label: Value Scenarios
fields.notes: DERIVED (deriveValueScenarios) from Status of Improvements + Authorized Use — not user-typed. Valcre custom field CF12414 (MultiOption).

fields.name: ApproachestoValue
fields.label: Approaches to Value
fields.notes: DERIVED (deriveApproaches) from Status of Improvements + Authorized Use — not user-typed. Valcre custom field CF12415 (MultiOption).

fields.name: AssignmentType
fields.label: Assignment Type
fields.notes: Single or multiple property. Valcre custom field CF12416 (SingleOption).

fields.name: ReportType
fields.label: Report Type
fields.notes: Comprehensive, Concise, or Form. Valcre custom field CF12417 (SingleOption).

fields.name: DesktopReport
fields.label: Desktop Report
fields.notes: Desktop-only report flag. Valcre custom field CF12418 (SingleOption).

fields.name: Valuetimeframe
fields.label: Value Timeframe
fields.notes: Current, Prospective, or Retrospective. Valcre custom field CF12419 (SingleOption).

fields.name: Fee
fields.label: Fee
fields.notes: Appraisal fee amount

fields.name: DeliveryTime
fields.label: Delivery Time
fields.notes: Business days for delivery. Valcre custom field CF12420.

fields.name: PaidDate
fields.label: Paid Date
fields.notes: Date payment received

fields.name: Paid
fields.label: Paid
fields.notes: Payment received flag. Valcre custom field CF12421.

fields.name: RequestDate
fields.label: Request Date
fields.notes: Date job was requested (Bid Date in Valcre)

fields.name: SignedDate
fields.label: Signed Date
fields.notes: LOE signed date (Award Date in Valcre)

fields.name: DueDate
fields.label: Due Date
fields.notes: Report due date

fields.name: AmountPaid
fields.label: Amount Paid
fields.notes: Total amount paid to date

fields.name: ClientDocuments
fields.label: Client Documents
fields.notes: Documents provided by client. Valcre custom field CF12422 (MultiOption).

fields.name: TransactionStatus
fields.label: Transaction Status
fields.notes: Property transaction status. Valcre custom field CF12424.

fields.name: ZoningStatus
fields.label: Zoning Status
fields.notes: Valcre custom field CF12425.

fields.name: LandMetric
fields.label: Land $/Metric
fields.notes: Land valuation metric. Valcre custom field CF12426.

fields.name: CMHCFinancing
fields.label: CMHC Financing
fields.notes: CMHC insured financing flag. Valcre custom field CF12427.

fields.name: CurrentUseImprovements
fields.label: Current Use
fields.notes: DIRECT user pick — current use of improvements (app key currentUseImprovements). Valcre custom field CF12410 (SingleOption).

fields.name: ProposedUseImprovements
fields.label: Proposed Use
fields.notes: DIRECT user pick — proposed use of improvements (app key proposedUseImprovements). Valcre custom field CF12411 (SingleOption).

fields.name: PreviouslyAppraised
fields.label: Previously Appraised
fields.notes: DIRECT user pick — previously-appraised flag (app key previouslyAppraised). Valcre custom field CF12423.

fields.name: EA1
fields.label: Extraordinary Assumption 1
fields.notes: Auto-populated from cascade/text library

scenarios.summary: current market value of the subject property as of the effective date

current makret value based on the extraordinary assumption and hypothetical condition that the existing improvements on the subject site do not exist, and that the property is vacant as of the effective date.

current market value of the subject property as proposed based upon the extraordinary assumption and hypothetical condition that the project is 100% complete and fully leased at market rents and is at stabilized occupancy, as of the effective date.
current market value of the subject property as improved as of the effective date
current market value of the subject property based on the extraordinary assumption that the subject property is fully leased at market rents and is at stabilized occupancy as of the effective date.

current market value of the subject property as proposed based upon the extraordinary assumption and hypothetical condition that the renovation is 100% complete and the property is fully leased and is at stabilized occupancy, as of the effective date.
